mapper.insert: insert into department_types ( department_type_id, company_id, code, name, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{departmentTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: select department_type_id, company_id, code, name, status, created_at, updated_at from department_types where company_id = #{companyId} order by name asc
